hypotheses.name: Housekeeping gene enrichment in SV1-high
hypotheses.method: Top/bottom 20% split by SV1 loading at L0/L5/L11. Fisher exact test of 238-gene Eisenberg housekeeping set enrichment in SV1-high vs SV1-low groups among 2039 nonzero genes.
hypotheses.result_value: OR=0.0 at L0 (0 vs 4), OR=inf at L5 (4 vs 0), OR=0.499 at L11; only 7 HK genes in nonzero set
hypotheses.next_action: Expand housekeeping gene reference using GO term annotations or STRING connectivity for all 2039 nonzero genes; 7-gene coverage is insufficient

hypotheses.name: H1 Betti loops on circuit genes at L8
hypotheses.method: Ripser Vietoris-Rips PH (maxdim=1) on SV2-4 projections of 295 circuit genes vs 295 matched non-circuit genes at L8. Compare H1 bar count, mean lifetime, total lifetime; MW test.
hypotheses.result_value: p=0.953, circuit H1 bars=108 vs non-circuit=119, mean_lt=0.00143 vs 0.00178; rbc=0.129 against circuit
hypotheses.next_action: Retire H1-loops for regulatory circuit detection. Non-circuit genes form more and longer loops, opposite of expected.
hypotheses.retirement_reason: Opposite direction: non-circuit genes form more H1 loops than circuit genes. MW p=0.953 against hypothesis.

hypotheses.name: SV5-7 regulatory signal after co-expression residualization
hypotheses.method: At each of 12 layers: SVD of centered nonzero embeddings [2039,512], project to SV5-7 (indices 4-6). Compute pairwise distances for TRRUST pos/neg pairs. OLS regression: regress full-embedding cosine similarity out of SV5-7 distances. Mann-Whitney test on residuals (pos < neg).
hypotheses.result_value: rbc_resid=0.148 (L0), 0.119 (L1), 0.083 (L2); all p<0.002. L3+ lose significance. SV2-4 retains signal only at L8.
hypotheses.next_action: Bootstrap validation (100 resamples) of SV5-7 L0-L2 signal. Extend to SV8-10 to characterize spectral decay. Biological annotation of SV5-7 top-loading genes at L0.
